svg.title: MoCKA System Architecture
svg.desc: MoCKA multi-model AI governance architecture showing the civilization loop, three core mechanisms, and fluid coordinate model

g.text: Agent A (executor) · Agent B (designer) · Agent C (auditor) · Agent D (researcher) · Agent E (proxy)
Observe → Record → Incident → Recurrence → Prevention → Decision → Action → Audit
Fluid coordinate model P(t) = (X, Y, Z)
X = Protocol fidelity (0.632) · Y = Record quality (0.826) · Z = Governance stability (0.819)
Main paper DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19503666 · Technical Notes TN1–TN7
